title: Velvety Braised Dutch Butternut Squash Skillet
description: A hearty and comforting solo dinner dish featuring butternut squash, this velvety braise is cooked to perfection in a cast-iron skillet. The result is a nutty and crumbly delight that is sure to satisfy.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the cubed butternut squash and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
Stir in the nutmeg, salt, and black pepper.
If using, sprinkle the breadcrumbs and grated cheese on top of the squash mixture.
Cook, uncovered, for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
